zh.lifeSummary: Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm是Hieronymus Kurz和Sabina Gassenmayer的兒子，於1650年2月16日出生在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 烏爾姆。他於1672年5月27日與Maria Elisabetha Deckhinger在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 烏爾姆結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm是Hieronymus Kurz和Sabina Gassenmayer的儿子，于1650年2月16日出生在德国爾特波格奧拉赤 烏爾姆。他于1672年5月27日与Maria Elisabetha Deckhinger在德国爾特波格奧拉赤 烏爾姆结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Kurtz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for someone who was short in stature, from Middle High German kur(t)z, German kurz ‘short’.

variants.name: Kurz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erna, Hans, Jutta, Armin, Benno, Fritz, Gunter, Heinz, Hermann, Horst, Manfred, Otto.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Kurtz  .

variants.name: Kurta
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Polish, Ukrainian, Belorussian kurta ‘short overcoat’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for someone who made such garments or possibly a nickname for someone who habitually wore a coat of this kind.

variants.name: Kurtzman
meanings: Americanized form of German Kurtzmann, and a variant of the same Jewish (Ashkenazic) surname: nickname for someone who was short in stature, a variant of Kurtz .

variants.name: Kurtzer
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname from an inflected form of   Kurtz   ‘short’.

nameMeanings.name: Daniel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘God is my judge’ in Hebrew), borne by the prophet whose story is told in the Book of Daniel. He was an Israelite slave of the Assyrian king Nebuchadnezzar, who obtained great favour through his skill in interpreting dreams and the ‘writing on the wall’ at the feast held by Nebuchadnezzar's son Belshazzar. His enemies managed to get him cast into a lions' den, but he was saved by God. This was a favourite tale in the Middle Ages, often represented in miracle plays. The name has been perennially popular among English speakers since the 16th century and has been particularly favoured since the 1980s.

en.lifeSummary: Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm was born on 16 February 1650, in Ulm, Württemberg, Germany as the son of Hieronymus Kurz and Sabina Gassenmayer. He married Maria Elisabetha Deckhinger on 27 May 1672, in Ulm, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm est né le 16 février 1650, à Oberamt Ulm, Württemberg, Allemagne, fils de Hieronymus Kurz et Sabina Gassenmayer. Il a épousé Maria Elisabetha Deckhinger le 27 mai 1672, à Oberamt Ulm, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm wurde am 16. Februar 1650 in Oberamt Ulm, Württemberg, Deutschland, als Sohn von Hieronymus Kurz und Sabina Gassenmayer geboren. Er hat am 27. Mai 1672 in Oberamt Ulm, Württemberg, Deutschland Maria Elisabetha Deckhinger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm è nato il il 16 febbraio 1650 nel Oberamt Ulm, Württemberg, Germania come figlio di Hieronymus Kurz e Sabina Gassenmayer. Lui sposato Maria Elisabetha Deckhinger il 27 maggio 1672, nel Oberamt Ulm, Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulmは1650年2月16日にドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト ウルムでHieronymus KurzとSabina Gassenmayerの息子として生まれた。1672年5月27日にドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト ウルムでMaria Elisabetha Deckhingerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm(은)는 1650년 2월 16일 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 울름에서 Hieronymus Kurz(와)과 Sabina Gassenmayer의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1672년 5월 27일 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 울름에서 Maria Elisabetha Deckhinger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm nasceu em 16 de fevereiro de 1650, em Oberamt Ulm, Württemberg, Alemanha filho de Hieronymus Kurz e Sabina Gassenmayer. Ele casou-se com Maria Elisabetha Deckhinger em 27 de maio de 1672, em Oberamt Ulm, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm родился 16 февраля 1650 г. в местности обирамт улм, вuрттембирг, Германия. Его родителей звали Hieronymus Kurz и Sabina Gassenmayer. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Elisabetha Deckhinger 27 мая 1672 г. в местности обирамт улм, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Daniel Kurtz Handelsmann in Ulm nació el 16 de febrero de 1650, en Oberamt Ulm, Württemberg, Alemania como hijo de Hieronymus Kurz y Sabina Gassenmayer. Se casó con Maria Elisabetha Deckhinger el 27 de mayo de 1672, en Oberamt Ulm, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
